todolist.list.empty: No checklists found. Please put .json checklist files into the todolist folder under the game directory.
todolist.list.count: %s checklist(s) available (click a name to run):
todolist.do.already_running: Checklist [%s] is already running. Please end it first with /todolist end %s.
todolist.do.not_found: Checklist not found: %s. Use /todolist list to see available checklists.
todolist.edit.not_found: Checklist not found: %s, editor opened anyway
todolist.exec.option_expired: This option is no longer valid (step has changed).
todolist.exec.max_steps: Reached max step limit (%s), checklist terminated.
todolist.exec.paused: (No jump specified for this step, checklist paused. Use /todolist end to end it.)
todolist.exec.back_finished: This checklist has ended, cannot go back.
todolist.exec.back_empty: Already at the earliest step, cannot go back.
todolist.exec.back_done: (Returned to previous step. Side effects cannot be undone, please choose again.)
todolist.exec.not_in_game: Cannot execute command: not in game.
todolist.do.version_warning: Warning: checklist [%s] requires MC version %s ~ %s, current is %s. Commands may be incompatible.
todolist.do.version_too_low: Current MC version is below the required minimum.
todolist.do.version_too_high: Current MC version is above the required maximum.
